state_resting_unmonitored: ^The monitor above Bed 4 is alarming. Mr Ahmed is lying still, eyes closed, breathing irregularly. He doesn't respond when you approach. The bedside alarm has been active for some time — there's no-one at the nursing station to hear it.
state_distressed: ^Mr Ahmed shifts restlessly in the bed, pressing the call bell repeatedly. His vital signs on the bedside screen are deteriorating. The alarm tone has changed — higher, more urgent.
state_critical: ^Mr Ahmed is motionless. The bedside monitor shows a flat-line alarm pattern. Nobody at the nursing station can see this — the central station is offline. The alarm is steady and insistent.
state_attended: ^The Staff Nurse is standing at Mr Ahmed's bedside, attending to him. She gives you a brief, worried glance but stays focused on the patient.
